scripts.lint:tokens: ! { grep -rEn '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}' src --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' | grep -vE 'src/theme/theme\.ts|src/lib/providers\.ts'; grep -rEn "'[0-9]+px'" src --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' | grep -v 'src/theme/theme\.ts'; } | grep . && echo 'lint:tokens PASS — no off-token hex or raw px in src/'
